# Stations Hotellet

> A 2-bedroom holiday apartment inside a converted historic railway station in
> Öjebyn, Piteå, on the Swedish Lapland coast. Whole apartment for up to 5
> guests, from 990 SEK per night all-inclusive (cleaning, linens, towels,
> Wi-Fi and private parking included — no hidden fees). Book direct.

## Key facts

- Address: Västra Järnvägsgatan 5, 943 31 Öjebyn, Piteå, Sweden (5 min by car from central Piteå)
- Capacity: 2 bedrooms (double bed; double bed + bunk bed), sleeps up to 5
- Facilities: full kitchen with dishwasher, two bathrooms, washer & dryer, in-room safe, fast Wi-Fi (75 Mbps), free private parking, self check-in lockbox, air conditioning
- Prices (SEK, all-inclusive): nightly 990 · weekly 6 200 (save 10%) · monthly 23 800 (save 20%)
- Check-in from 15:00 (self check-in, lockbox) · check-out by 11:00
- No pets, no smoking
- Reviews: 63 five-star guest reviews on Airbnb
- Tourism: northern lights (aurora borealis) visible from the street September–March; Pite Havsbad beach resort ~15 km; midnight sun June–July; Luleå Airport ~50 km; dog sledding, snowmobile and ice fishing in winter
- Guests from healthcare/corporate: monthly rate designed for contractors at Piteå Hospital

## Pages

- https://stationshotellet.com/ : English (main)
- https://stationshotellet.com/sv/ : Svenska
- https://stationshotellet.com/fr/ : Français

- https://stationshotellet.com/pl/ : Polski
- https://stationshotellet.com/ro/ : Română
- https://stationshotellet.com/terms.html : Booking terms (English & Swedish)
